data.content: Implementation complete for core Rust acceptance-field tests. Branch knots-2412-acceptance-field rebased on main (21bd738), make sanity passes at 95.22% coverage (707 tests). Test files: tests_acceptance_ext.rs (round-trip create/rehydrate, update/event, JSON shape, clear), sync/apply_tests_acceptance_ext.rs (sync handlers), cli_tests.rs (--acceptance flag parsing). The foolery knots-backend-coverage.test.ts tests referenced in the description cannot be implemented in this repository as foolery sources are not present here — that coverage should be addressed in the foolery repository separately.
